text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove seems unwell, so I take her to the
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Please... You're worrying over nothing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But I won't argue. It's hard to when you look that
worried...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You can head home. If it's a break you want me to
take, I'll listen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Where am I? Last I remember, I was in the
infirmary...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Who goes there?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove (?)
text_block_list.text: Isn't it obvious? I'm you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove (?)
text_block_list.text:
You haven't changed a bit—incapable of
following even the simplest instructions.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove (?)
text_block_list.text:
Surely you realize the accuracy of your trainer's
remarks.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Be that as it may, I'll never grow if I'm always
clinging to my trainer's knee like a child.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove (?)
text_block_list.text:
Clinging to someone and trusting someone are
two different things. If you trust them, then you
must allow yourself to rely on them.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You... have a point. However—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove (?)
text_block_list.text:
Enough with this "however" nonsense! You'll never
grow if you let this foolish pride of yours
constantly cloud your judgment!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you're right. I must learn how to be more
trusting.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What... in the world just happened?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? My body feels awfully light...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what that was, but it was certainly
insightful. I should go and say thanks later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thanks to her rest, Air Groove is back in form.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What in the world was that?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What a strange dream... I never imagined I'd get
to experience one of my own lectures.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Being on the receiving end sure takes a lot out of you though... Sigh...
